title: euphorbia ferox subsp. ferox
intro: Euphorbia ferox subsp. ferox, commonly known as the "candelabra tree" or "gloriosa candelabra," is a species of succulent plant in the Euphorbiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in South African folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Euphorbia ferox subsp. ferox include its potential to treat various ailments such as wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant, often in the form of infusions or tinctures, are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
